visual_description: A man with dark hair holds a silver flip phone to his ear, his gaze directed downward and his expression focused. Another man with gray hair, wearing a dark jacket, holds a phone to his ear while seated, looking slightly to his right. The background features vertical blinds and soft, diffused lighting, suggesting an indoor setting.
